gaps: A base-rate prior for SCOTUS certiorari grants (overall and paid-docket) surfaced directly from the corpus would beat heterogeneous historical opinions.
fedcourts query returns old published opinions whose disposition labels do not map onto modern cert grant/deny practice; a filter for cert-stage dispositions would help.
helpful: fedcourts paths to resolve the snapshot/event paths.
schemas/prediction.schema.json as the exact output contract.
notes: Snapshot encodes no realized disposition (cert grant/deny/terminated dates all null), so the call rests on Rule 10 and the cert base rate. Corpus priors were not informative for this decision class.
